nodes.label: Equation as balance
nodes.reason: Profile suggests Equation as balance may already be familiar, so keep it short.
nodes.scene_goal: An equation is a math sentence where both sides match.

nodes.label: Equals sign
nodes.reason: Equals sign is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: The equals sign means the left and right sides have the same value.

nodes.label: Left side / right side
nodes.reason: Left side / right side is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: Equations have two sides that we compare.

nodes.label: Variable
nodes.reason: Variable is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: A variable like x is a number we do not know yet.

nodes.label: Substitution
nodes.reason: Substitution is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: Substitution means trying a value in place of x.

nodes.label: Squared
nodes.reason: Squared is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: x squared means x multiplied by itself.

nodes.label: x² vs 2x
nodes.reason: x² vs 2x is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: x² and 2x look similar but mean different things.

nodes.label: Quadratic form
nodes.reason: Quadratic form is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: A quadratic equation has an x² part.

nodes.label: Parabola
nodes.reason: Parabola is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: The graph of a quadratic is a smooth U-shaped curve.

nodes.label: Roots
nodes.reason: Roots is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: Roots are where the curve touches the x-axis.

nodes.label: Solving
nodes.reason: Solving is needed before the main topic feels safe.
nodes.scene_goal: Solving means finding the x-values that make the equation balance.
